name: simple_filter_limit
query: SELECT u.name FROM users AS u WHERE u.name = 'Alice' ORDER BY u.name LIMIT 1

name: relationship_projection
query: SELECT a.name AS from_name, r.note AS note, b.name AS to_name FROM users AS a JOIN knows AS r ON r.from_id = a.id JOIN users AS b ON b.id = r.to_id ORDER BY from_name, to_name

name: left_join_fallback_projection
query: SELECT COALESCE(p.nickname, u.name) AS name FROM users AS u LEFT JOIN profiles AS p ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE 'Al%' ORDER BY name

name: left_join_grouped_count
query: SELECT u.name AS name, COUNT(p.user_id) AS total FROM users AS u LEFT JOIN profiles AS p ON p.user_id = u.id GROUP BY u.name ORDER BY total DESC

name: cte_scalar_rebinding
query: WITH named_users AS (SELECT u.name AS name FROM users AS u) SELECT name FROM named_users ORDER BY name

name: grouped_aggregate
query: SELECT u.name AS name, MAX(u.score) AS top FROM users AS u GROUP BY u.name ORDER BY top DESC

name: recursive_projection
query: WITH RECURSIVE user_paths AS (SELECT from_id AS start_id, to_id AS end_id, 1 AS depth FROM knows UNION ALL SELECT user_paths.start_id AS start_id, knows.to_id AS end_id, user_paths.depth + 1 AS depth FROM user_paths JOIN knows ON knows.from_id = user_paths.end_id WHERE user_paths.depth < 2) SELECT start_id, end_id FROM user_paths ORDER BY end_id

name: recursive_grouped_count
query: WITH RECURSIVE user_paths AS (SELECT from_id AS start_id, to_id AS end_id, 1 AS depth FROM knows UNION ALL SELECT user_paths.start_id AS start_id, knows.to_id AS end_id, user_paths.depth + 1 AS depth FROM user_paths JOIN knows ON knows.from_id = user_paths.end_id WHERE user_paths.depth < 2) SELECT end_id AS friend_id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM user_paths GROUP BY end_id ORDER BY total DESC

name: fixed_length_multi_hop_projection
query: SELECT a.name AS user_name, c.name AS company FROM users AS a JOIN knows AS r ON r.from_id = a.id JOIN users AS b ON b.id = r.to_id JOIN works_at AS s ON s.from_id = b.id JOIN companies AS c ON c.id = s.to_id ORDER BY company

name: recursive_zero_hop_projection
query: WITH RECURSIVE user_paths AS (SELECT u.id AS start_id, u.id AS end_id, 0 AS depth FROM users AS u UNION ALL SELECT k.from_id AS start_id, k.to_id AS end_id, 1 AS depth FROM knows AS k UNION ALL SELECT user_paths.start_id AS start_id, knows.to_id AS end_id, user_paths.depth + 1 AS depth FROM user_paths JOIN knows ON knows.from_id = user_paths.end_id WHERE user_paths.depth < 2) SELECT start_id AS user_id, end_id AS friend_id FROM user_paths ORDER BY friend_id, user_id

name: searched_case_projection
query: SELECT CASE WHEN u.age >= 18 THEN u.name ELSE 'minor' END AS label FROM users AS u ORDER BY label

name: id_projection
query: SELECT r.from_id AS uid, r.kind AS rel_type, r.from_id AS start_id, r.to_id AS end_id FROM knows AS r ORDER BY uid

name: relational_metadata_projection
query: SELECT u.id AS user_id, 'KNOWS' AS rel_type, r.from_id AS start_id, r.to_id AS end_id FROM users AS u JOIN knows AS r ON r.from_id = u.id ORDER BY user_id, start_id, end_id

name: string_property_functions
query: SELECT LOWER(r.note) AS lower_note, LENGTH(r.note) AS note_len, CAST(r.weight AS TEXT) AS weight_text FROM knows AS r ORDER BY lower_note, note_len, weight_text

name: values_projection
query: SELECT x.column1 AS value FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS x ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 2

name: insert_user
query: INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30)

name: insert_edge_from_select
query: INSERT INTO edges (from_id, to_id, type) SELECT b.id, e.id, 'TYPE' FROM begin_nodes AS b CROSS JOIN end_nodes AS e WHERE e.name = 'finish'

name: insert_edge_with_conflict_ignore
query: INSERT INTO edges (from_id, to_id, type) SELECT u.id, p.id, 'INTRODUCED' FROM users AS u JOIN people AS p ON p.name = 'Cara' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

name: update_user
query: UPDATE users SET age = 31 WHERE name = 'Alice'

name: delete_relationship
query: DELETE FROM knows WHERE note IS NOT NULL

name: postgres_cast_projection
query: SELECT id, created_at::TIMESTAMP AS created_ts FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%@example.com' ORDER BY created_ts DESC LIMIT 5

name: relational_text_projection
query: SELECT LOWER(u.city) AS city FROM users AS u ORDER BY city
